# PecanX — GitHub Sponsors tier copy

Reference copy for the tiers at <https://github.com/sponsors/Franklin-B/dashboard>.
GitHub Sponsors tiers are configured in that dashboard (this file is just the source text to
paste in). Names follow the PecanX "orchard" theme. Adjust amounts to taste.

---

## Monthly tiers

### 🌰 Pecan — $3 / month
**Plant a seed.**
You believe correctness-first tooling should exist, and you're chipping in to help it grow.
Thank you — every bit of support keeps PecanX moving.

- Sponsor badge on your GitHub profile
- Your name in `BACKERS.md`

### 🌱 Sapling — $10 / month
**Help it take root.**
A meaningful vote of confidence that keeps development steady — docs, examples, and the compiler.

- Everything in **Pecan**
- Listed as a backer in the project README
- A warm thank-you in the monthly progress note

### ◗ Orchard — $25 / month
**Grow the ecosystem.**
For individuals and small teams who rely on the ideas behind PecanX and want to see them shipped.

- Everything in **Sapling**
- Your name or handle in the "Sponsors" section of the README and the docs site
- Early access to release notes before they're public

### 🌳 Grove — $100 / month
**Back it seriously.**
For companies and power users betting on correctness-first, full-stack tooling.

- Everything in **Orchard**
- Your logo + link in the README and on pecanai.io/pecanx
- Priority on issues and feature discussion
- A monthly written development update

---

## One-time tiers

### ☕ Coffee — $5 (one-time)
A quick thank-you for a tool that saved you a bug. Your name in `BACKERS.md`.

### 🎁 Patron — $50 (one-time)
A generous one-off boost. Logo/name in the README "Sponsors" section for the next release cycle.

---

*PecanX is free and MIT-licensed. Sponsorship is entirely optional and funds development time,
infrastructure, and docs — never paywalls. Thank you.*
